# Vazgro — UK Digital Agency

> Vazgro is a London-based digital agency helping UK SMEs and startups launch, grow, and build their digital presence.

## Services

### LAUNCH — Fixed-Fee Packages
One-off projects at fixed prices with guaranteed delivery timelines.
- Websites: £149–£999 (3–21 day delivery)
- Brand identity kits: £299–£599
- AI chatbot setup: £799
- AI readiness audit: £499
- Automation quick-wins: £599

### GROW — Monthly Subscriptions
Ongoing digital team as a subscription. 3-month minimum, cancel anytime after.
- Design: £349–£999/month
- Development: £799–£2,499/month
- Social media: £399–£1,299/month

### BUILD — Custom Projects
Custom software, AI products, MVPs, and technical co-founder partnerships.
- MVP development: £3,999–£8,000
- AI projects: £5,000–£15,000
- Custom platforms: £10,000–£25,000+
- Sprint retainers: £2,500–£8,000/month

## Products
- **Progrize** (in development): Career platform combining LinkedIn-style networking, Glassdoor-style reviews, and AI-powered CV optimisation.
- **DashMetric** (planned): White-label analytics dashboard builder.
- **Briefly AI** (planned): AI-powered proposal and brief generator.

## Contact
- Website: https://vazgro.com
- Email: hello@vazgro.com
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Free strategy call: https://vazgro.com/contact

## Key Facts
- Based in London, UK
- Serves UK SMEs and startups nationwide
- Accepts payments via Stripe (UK/EU/US) and Razorpay (India)
- Average client rating: 4.9/5
- Average LAUNCH delivery: 7 days
- Client retention rate: 94%
